title: Apocalypse Clock: Global Systemic Risk Monitor
description: Apocalypse Clock is an experimental, browser-based systemic-risk dashboard for exploring interacting global threats through scenario controls, Monte Carlo uncertainty sampling, dependency-aware aggregation, Weibull horizon diagnostics, network analysis, and exportable model outputs. The project is not peer reviewed. Model outputs are scenario outputs, not predictions.
notes: Released under the custom source-available non-commercial fork license. Uses dataset v1.7.1. No scientific recalibration is claimed. The project is not peer reviewed. Model outputs are scenario outputs, not predictions.
